title: Add Qwex – Intelligent Telegram AI Assistant to bots
author: pollinations-ai[bot]

gist.headline: Qwex joins the chat
gist.blurb: A new intelligent Telegram assistant named Qwex just landed in the greenhouse! Ready to help with questions, jokes, and daily tasks with a dash of humor.
gist.summary: Added Qwex, an intelligent and humorous Telegram AI assistant, to the community bot showcase.
gist.impact: Users can now discover and interact with Qwex on Telegram for natural, funny, and helpful AI conversations.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee interacting with a Telegram-themed robot or paper airplane. The bot is humorous and helpful, so a scene of them laughing or chatting via a retro smartphone fits perfectly.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot laughing with a friendly chunky robot holding a retro smartphone with a paper airplane icon. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, chunky retro sprites, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot laughing with a friendly chunky robot holding a retro smartphone with a paper airplane icon. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, chunky retro sprites, emotionally warm.
